message:
fix: wire useCardLoadingState in DNSHealth card (#3701)

DNSHealth bypassed the standard card loading infrastructure entirely,
missing skeleton states, demo badge, failure badge, and refresh animation.
Now uses useCardLoadingState with proper isLoading, isRefreshing,
isDemoData, hasAnyData, isFailed, and consecutiveFailures — consistent
with EtcdStatus and all other cards.

Closes #3673

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
